questions.prompt: Which EC2 pricing model provides the lowest cost but can be interrupted?
questions.explanation: Spot Instances are the cheapest but can be reclaimed by AWS.

questions.prompt: Which AWS service provides recommendations for cost savings?
questions.explanation: Trusted Advisor provides cost optimization checks.

questions.prompt: Which pricing option is best for workloads with predictable usage?
questions.explanation: Reserved Instances provide discounts for predictable workloads.

questions.prompt: Which service allows you to analyze and visualize AWS costs?
questions.explanation: Cost Explorer provides cost and usage analysis.

questions.prompt: Which pricing model provides flexible discounts across multiple services?
questions.explanation: Savings Plans provide flexible discounts across compute services.

questions.prompt: Which service provides detailed billing and usage reports?
questions.explanation: The CUR provides detailed billing data.

questions.prompt: Which service allows setting budgets and receiving alerts?
questions.explanation: AWS Budgets lets you set custom cost and usage budgets.

questions.prompt: Which storage class is most cost-effective for infrequently accessed data?
questions.explanation: S3 Standard-IA is cheaper for infrequently accessed data.

questions.prompt: Which service helps identify underutilized EC2 instances?
Which pricing model is best for short-term, unpredictable workloads?
questions.explanation: On-Demand is flexible for unpredictable workloads.
